title: Python Programming Basics
description: An introduction to Python syntax, variables, control flow, functions, and simple scripts.

title: Git and GitHub Foundations
description: Learn version control basics, commits, branches, pull requests, and collaborative workflows.

title: Command Line Basics
description: Use terminal commands to navigate files, run scripts, manage environments, and automate simple tasks.

title: Data Structures Intro
description: Covers lists, stacks, queues, dictionaries, sets, trees, and when to use each structure.

title: Algorithms Basics
description: Practice searching, sorting, recursion, complexity analysis, and basic problem-solving patterns.

title: Object-Oriented Programming in Python
description: Learn classes, objects, inheritance, encapsulation, and how to organize larger Python applications.

title: Testing and Debugging Practice
description: Write unit tests, reproduce bugs, inspect failures, use logging, and build safer development habits.

title: HTML and CSS Fundamentals
description: Build static pages while learning semantic HTML, CSS layout, responsive design, and accessibility basics.

title: JavaScript Essentials
description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals, DOM manipulation, events, modules, and asynchronous code.

title: Build a Frontend Mini App
description: Create a small interactive browser app with state, reusable components, and deployed source control.

title: SQL and Relational Databases
description: Study tables, relationships, SELECT queries, joins, aggregation, indexes, and basic schema design.

title: Database Design and Modeling
description: Design normalized schemas, relationships, constraints, indexes, and data models for real applications.

title: REST API Design
description: Design and implement HTTP APIs with routing, validation, persistence, authentication concepts, and error handling.

title: FastAPI Basics
description: Build Python web APIs with FastAPI, request validation, route handlers, dependency injection, and simple persistence.

title: Authentication Basics for Web APIs
description: Learn login flows, password hashing, tokens, sessions, permissions, and secure API access patterns.

title: Docker Basics for Developers
description: Package applications with containers, write Dockerfiles, manage images, and run services consistently.

title: Deployment Fundamentals
description: Understand environments, configuration, hosting, logs, environment variables, and basic release workflows.

title: Data Analysis with Pandas
description: Load, clean, transform, summarize, and visualize datasets using Python data analysis tools.

title: Data Visualization with Python
description: Create plots and dashboards that communicate patterns, trends, comparisons, and distributions.

title: Statistics Basics for Data Science
description: Study descriptive statistics, probability, distributions, sampling, correlation, and uncertainty.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning
description: Learn supervised learning, regression, classification, training workflows, and basic model selection.

title: Machine Learning Model Evaluation
description: Evaluate models using train-test splits, cross-validation, precision, recall, F1 score, ROC curves, and error analysis.

title: Feature Engineering Practice
description: Transform raw data into useful features through encoding, scaling, aggregation, missing value handling, and domain signals.

title: Natural Language Processing Basics
description: Learn tokenization, text normalization, bag-of-words, text classification, and basic NLP pipelines.

title: Text Preprocessing Workshop
description: Clean, tokenize, normalize, and prepare text datasets for search, classification, and language model workflows.

title: Large Language Model Fundamentals
description: Understand how large language models work, their capabilities, limitations, context windows, and common use cases.

title: Prompt Engineering for Practical AI Systems
description: Design effective prompts, few-shot examples, structured outputs, evaluation prompts, and prompt iteration strategies.

title: Structured Output with LLMs
description: Use schemas, JSON responses, validation, retries, and guardrails to make LLM outputs usable in applications.

title: Embeddings and Semantic Search
description: Learn how embeddings represent meaning, how semantic similarity works, and how embeddings support search and recommendation.

title: Vector Databases for AI Applications
description: Study vector indexes, similarity search, metadata filtering, and how vector databases are used in AI applications.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Fundamentals
description: Build a basic retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using documents, embeddings, retrieval, and answer generation.

title: Chatbot Design Concepts
description: Learn intents, conversation flows, fallback handling, user experience principles, and chatbot use cases.

title: Build a Rule-Based Chatbot
description: Implement a simple chatbot using Python rules, dictionaries, conditionals, and predefined conversation flows.

title: Build an LLM-Powered Chatbot
description: Create a chatbot that calls an LLM API, handles user messages, formats prompts, and returns structured responses.

title: Build a RAG Chatbot over Documents
description: Develop a chatbot that answers questions from private documents using retrieval-augmented generation.

title: Deploy a Chatbot API
description: Package, configure, and deploy a chatbot backend service with environment variables, API keys, and basic monitoring.

title: Responsible AI and Ethics Basics
description: Study fairness, transparency, privacy, hallucinations, safety, and responsible deployment of AI systems.

title: Privacy and Data Handling for AI Systems
description: Learn how to handle user data, API keys, logs, consent, sensitive information, and privacy risks in AI applications.
